main_reason_codes.description: The optimized leaf uses a secp256k1-specialized complete mixed j=0 formula with a narrow, branch-free hot path.
The optimized arithmetic schedule keeps the working state compact at 12 arithmetic slots while preserving exact ISA-level basis-state semantics.
The repository keeps the public retained-window structure explicit instead of hiding schedule changes inside headline totals.
The resource win is reported as a backend projection against the public appendix envelope, with exactness claims kept at the ISA and lookup-contract boundary.

notes: This file compares the primary optimized artifact against the checked-in public-envelope reconstruction data.
The public-envelope point-add numbers are resource contracts from the published appendix-aligned reconstruction, not machine-readable ISA schedules.
